summary: Full backend + frontend regression for Street Shield app. 14/14 backend pytest cases pass. Frontend Splash → Home → Activate Shield toggle → 7 tiles → Quick Alert (contacts CRUD + SOS) → Radar / Cycling / Voice Info / Activity / Voice AI / AI Audio sub-pages all load. Language pill opens with 12 options. Zero console/page errors.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py uses deprecated FastAPI on_event('shutdown'); consider lifespan handlers (non-blocking).
Activity endpoint returns synthetic stats derived from alerts/contacts counts; values are deterministic and never decrease — fine for demo, but document this.

Home.jsx initially calls setState({...prev, ...s}) which is fine, but when toggleShield posts, it sends the full local state to /shield/state — server merges via exclude_unset, but the client passes all fields explicitly; no real bug, just slightly chatty.
_serialize_dt recursively handles dicts; no list handling — only matters if nested arrays of datetimes are added later.
seed_data_creation: TEST_-prefixed contacts/alerts created during tests are cleaned up by the delete tests; one residual TEST_emergency alert remains in alerts log (can stay as demo data).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_street_shield_api.py runs in <2s and covers all 8 endpoints. Splash uses sessionStorage 'ss_splashed' key. data-testids present: home-title, activate-shield-button, tile-voice-ai/quick-alert/radar/ai-audio/activity/cycling/voice-info, sos-button, contact-name-input, contact-phone-input, contact-add-button, contact-row-{id}, contact-delete-{id}, and one element with [data-testid*=language] for the language pill (clicking opens a 12-item language menu).
rca of the issue: No issues found — both backend (14/14 pytest) and frontend flows are working correctly.
